body: This is needed for interpolating to "located" single column grids, which we use in `ClimaOcean` for examples.

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fix FieldTimeSeries interpolation for single column grids with x, y locations

body: 100% bikeshedding. I feel like `FieldDataset` should just use `Symbols` but might be nice to support both for now.
title: Supporting indexing a `FieldDataset` with a `Symbol`
